title: Δd Charge Angle 2: Traversal Characterization (TQC, Monads, Toposes)

EML-1.example_monad: Unit η: Id → T (one step from identity)
EML-1.example_topos: Exponential object B^A (one step above hom-set)

EML-\u221e.example_TQC: Dense braid limit = universal SU(2) computation
EML-\u221e.example_topos: Classifying topos (classifies all models of a geometric theory)

hierarchy.traversal_definition: A traversal system has categorical data at ALL five EML levels

coherence_hierarchy.key_insight: EML depth = categorical coherence level; traversal = all 5 levels present

tqc.note: TQC = MTC: the categorical axioms force presence at all 5 EML levels

level_inf.data: Free monad T* = colimit of T^n

monad.note: Monad axioms force the ladder: unit(1) + mult(2) + algebra(3) + free(∞)

topos.algebraic_structure: Locally cartesian closed category with subobject classifier
topos.note: Topos models dependent type theory: all 5 levels from type-theoretic axioms

three_systems_deep.key_insight: MTC + monoid-in-endofunctors + LCCC+Ω: three independent algebraic paths to full traversal

theorem.condition_1: Distinguished object at each EML level 0-∞
theorem.condition_2: EML-3 coherence condition linking lower levels
theorem.categorical_statement: S is traversal iff internal language = DTT with universes
theorem.common_feature: All three are models of dependent type theory with different structural assumptions
theorem.non_traversal_reason: Groups/rings lack universe hierarchy (EML-3/∞ coherence absent)

type_correspondence.homotopy_type_theory: HoTT unifies all: EML depth = homotopy level = type depth
type_correspondence.note: EML ladder IS the type-theoretic universe hierarchy

unification_theorem.key_insight: Traversal = internal DTT with universes; EML ladder = type universe hierarchy

eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Coherence conditions, identity types, braiding pentagon/hexagon
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Higher coherence, universe hierarchy, free/classifying constructions

key_theorem: The EML Traversal Characterization Theorem (S193 Conjecture): A mathematical structure S traverses the complete EML ladder 0→1→2→3→∞ iff its internal language is a dependent type theory with universe hierarchy. EML depth = categorical coherence level = type-theoretic level. EML-0 = base types. EML-1 = function types. EML-2 = dependent types. EML-3 = identity types / coherence conditions. EML-∞ = universe hierarchy. The three confirmed traversal systems (TQC, monad, topos) have internal languages BMTT, effect calculus, and Martin-Löf DTT respectively — all models of dependent type theory with universes. Non-traversal systems (groups, rings, vector spaces) lack the identity type / coherence level (EML-3) or the universe (EML-∞). This unifies the three seemingly unrelated structures through HoTT: the EML depth ladder IS the homotopy level / type universe hierarchy.
rabbit_hole_log: EML depth = type-theoretic level: {base, function, dependent, identity, universe}
HoTT unifies all three traversal systems: they're all models of DTT
EML-3 = identity types: the OSCILLATORY nature of coherence = path equality checking
EML-∞ = universe hierarchy: Girard's paradox (U:U) = EML-∞ (self-referential = undecidable)
Non-traversal systems lack EML-3/∞: groups have EML-0/1/2 max (no coherence tower)
TQC's BMTT = braided extension of DTT: the braiding lives at EML-3 (coherence)

connections.S187_tqc: TQC = MTC = braided monoidal type theory: traversal forced by BMTT axioms
connections.S189_cat: Topos = DTT model: traversal from internally modeling Martin-Löf type theory
connections.S191_breakthrough: EML-3 = identity types = coherence: explains why EML-3/∞ boundary is Horizon
